steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that compares the lengths of the two rivers using data from the notes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — describes only one river's length: This gives a single river's length without comparing it to the other river. ✗
  • Choice B — compares something other than length: This contrasts a feature of the rivers that is not their length. ✗
  • Choice C — describes only one river's length: Again, only one river is addressed — no comparison is made. ✗
  • Choice D — 'The Madeira River is shorter than the Amur River': This directly compares the two rivers' lengths using the numerical data in the notes. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
